feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Defying the prophecy
entry.summary:
Author: Transjellyfishboy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,888Chapters: 3/23Kudos: 2

Summary: This is a Merlin rewrite and I'm gonna be honest I have a lot of hopes and expectations for this so not sure if I'll ever finish.Merlin finds out about the prophecy and how things are supposed to play out and actively steers against it all. Basically imagine if Merlin saw everything how it played out in the show and then he, rethinks what to do and how to choose.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,543Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 199

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,716Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but sets in a motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy.

entry.title: The Drying of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Marshmellow0v0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,007Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: After Gwen discovers that Camelot’s entire water supply has vanished, Arthur begins to panic. He knows what the cause of this is and doesn't know how to stop it. That goddamn unicorn. Arthur regrets not being more persistent in finding the sorcerer like he was told when he sees how Merlin is suffering. Merlin has been giving his food and water away and now he's the one that will have to face the consequences.

entry.title: If I told you myself
entry.summary:
Author: riverray

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 131,784Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 1,107

Summary: Merlin can’t remember the last time he’s locked his bedroom door, if ever. But he chooses not to think about it. He merely sulks his way back to his bed, taking a moment to contemplate taking off his trousers and tunic from the night before. He decides not to think about that either. Instead, he decides not to think at all. He just falls back into his bed, covers up his body more so in shame than for warmth, and closes his eyes.   Basically Merlin is sexually assaulted and this story follows how he and everyone else deals with it. Spoiler alert: THEY DON'T HANDLE IT WELL.

entry.title: The Bruise
entry.summary:
Author: hpalsowritessecretly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,240Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 23

Summary: Merlin trips and Arthur becomes fixated on the resulting bruise. Meanwhile, Merlin tries to distract Arthur from finding out about his magic with some convoluted 4D chess. This is 30% them bickering and 70% vague smut. They don’t explicitly have sex but they do jerk each other off a few times.

entry.title: With you, time and time again
entry.summary:
Author: BookiePookies25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,529Chapters: 6/20Kudos: 140

Summary: “This is a destiny of your own making, Arthur Pendragon. Whether you regret it or not is of no consequence. You have offered your soul, and it is a promise you cannot break.” After Arthur dies, a mysterious force throws Merlin and Arthur back in time, right to when they first met. Burdened by memories, overstrung by knowledge, they navigate an unfamiliar Camelot while trying to ease back into their comfortable dynamic before the revelation of Merlin's magic. But nothing’s ever easy. For one, Merlin has the unnerving skill to dive head first into trouble, and this time round Arthur know enough not to be completely oblivious. Are their memories enough to help them usher in the promised golden age? And what do events from a thousand years ago have to do with everything? OrIn which we attempt to untangle the emotional trauma that was Merlin’s life, the messed up but precious friendship that was Merlin and Arthur, and the character injustice that was Morgana. OrHow destiny was made

entry.title: Master of the Serpent
entry.summary:
Author: theletters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,553Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: After Merlin is taken by Morgana's mercenaries, Arthur miraculously finds him stumbling around in the forest. Merlin appears to be fine – except he's acting a little strange. Could it be... love? I.e., A Servant of Two Masters, if Arthur found out Merlin had been enchanted.

entry.title: What Time Uncovers
entry.summary:
Author: earlgreytea28

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,745Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: A little oneshot where Arthur and Merlin accidentally time travel into the future. They meet their future, get a little bit of guidance (and maybe have a few revelations about each other). Excerpt: “Well, your intuition is great. We are in the wrong time.”  “Damn. Maybe I sent us twenty years forward?” “I really hope in twenty years I don’t still have your useless ass as a servant.” Arthur pointed towards the lump of laundry. In reality, it was comforting to know Merlin stayed by his side through all the years.  “You’ve got to be kidding me. My life doesn’t get better than this?” Merlin groaned and flopped onto the floor. “This is all I’ve got? This is all I exist for?” Underneath the teasing, Arthur could sense the genuine despair in his voice. He tried not to feel too hurt by it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,800Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,377Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Take My Life (And Hold It Tight)
entry.summary:
Author: DollopheadedMerlin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,026Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: After Gaius dies at the hands of Agravaine in the events of The Secret Sharer, Merlin reveals his magic to Arthur as a last ditch effort to see if Destiny was truly on his side.What follows is a terrible series of revelations, dubious rituals, offensive job offers, and lots of not-quite secrets still to be revealed. A season 4 & 5 rewrite where everything is worse.

entry.title: The secretary
entry.summary:
Author: MaybeDonut (Theroundbartable)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,678Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 239

Summary: Arthur is the boss. And every boss needs a secretary. As Arthur's secretary George is stolen away by his father for little more than a good grade on a resumé, Arthur searches for a new one.The interview he holds that day will be burned into his mind for the rest of his life.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,283Chapters: 66/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Treason

entry.title: 500 Miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,415Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back. Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t. The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word *traitor.* A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

  • Leon & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwaine & Merlin (Merlin)
